data.title: DoraHacks held BUIDL Day in Denver, with 45 star startup projects participating in the show
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News On March 2, DoraHacks held BUIDL Day in Denver, focusing on the early startup teams of the DoraHacks platform, and 45 star projects participated in the fair and roadshow. At BUIDL Day, DoraHacks released important focus areas for 2025, including: consumer-grade encryption applications, autonomous intelligent body encryption and organization, Freedom of BUIDL and privacy technology, sovereign independent blockchain, open source quantum software and infrastructure, quantum blockchain, open source hardware, etc. DoraHacks partners such as Aptos, Flow, Circle, Kaia, Sonic, Cosmos, Babylon, Movement, Initia, etc. participated in the event and provided support.

data.title: Bitcoin Expected To Rebound As Losses Reach Historical Threshold
data.description: According to PANews, cryptocurrency analyst Ali Martinez shared insights on the X platform, indicating that historically, Bitcoin tends to rebound when on-chain traders experience actual losses of -12%. Currently, this figure stands at -14%, suggesting a potential recovery for Bitcoin.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 86,000 USDT with a 0.50% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 02, 2025, 06:00 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 86,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 86,011.21875 USDT, with a narrowed 0.50% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: SoftBank CEO Pursues Major AI Investment Loan
data.description:
According to Foresight News, SoftBank Group CEO Masayoshi Son is in discussions to secure a loan of up to $16 billion dedicated to investments in the AI sector. The company may seek an additional $8 billion in borrowing by early 2026.

Previously, The Information reported that SoftBank plans to invest a total of $40 billion in Stargate, a joint venture with Oracle and OpenAI, and OpenAI...

data.title: Japan finance minister: 110% bitcoin tax ‘is possible’ and ‘not limited to crypto’
data.description:
Minister of Finance Katsunobu Kato has finally addressed a bitcoin tax issue the Japanese have been worried about for months now: the absurd possibility of 110% taxes on bitcoin and other digital assets. Kato noted at a budget committee meeting that this situation is indeed possible under the current law and is “not limited to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-finance-minister-bitcoin-tax/

data.title: Ethereum Investment Considered Challenging Yet Promising, Says Three Arrows Capital Co-Founder
data.description: According to Odaily, Zhu Su, co-founder of Three Arrows Capital, recently expressed his views on Ethereum investments. He stated that from a purely technical perspective, investing in Ethereum is currently challenging. However, he noted that if one believes in the decentralized open-source community's ability to self-correct and self-govern towards a prosperous future, investing at the price of $2,222 could be a prudent choice.

data.title: DoraHacks And Google Cloud Forge Strategic Partnership
data.description: According to Odaily, DoraHacks and Dora Ventures have announced a strategic partnership with Google Cloud during BUIDL Day. As part of this collaboration, Google Cloud will provide $350,000 in cloud computing and AI services to the most promising startups within the DoraHacks ecosystem. Additionally, the partnership aims to launch more developer incentive programs focusing on cutting-edge technology fields, including hackathons centered on quantum computing and open-source hardware.

data.title: SoftBank CEO Pursues Major AI Investment Loan
data.description:
According to Foresight News, SoftBank Group CEO Masayoshi Son is in discussions to secure a loan of up to $16 billion dedicated to investments in the AI sector. The company may seek an additional $8 billion in borrowing by early 2026.

Previously, The Information reported that SoftBank plans to invest a total of $40 billion in Stargate, a joint venture with Oracle and OpenAI, and OpenAI itself. The company has initiated talks to raise up to $18.5 billion, backed by its publicly listed assets.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
A user used 50x leverage to buy BTC and ETH, with a total principal of approximately $3.9 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News User @Rocky_Bitcoin posted on the X platform that on-chain data showed that a whale recently opened a large long position with a high leverage of 50 times, including ETH longs worth $120 million and BTC longs worth $70 million, totaling about $190 million, with a total principal of about $3.9 million. The ETH opening price was $2196.91 and the BTC opening price was $85880.80.
As of press time, the ETH price was $2226 and the BTC price was $85862.
